description:
Implement `hx-toast` and `hx-toast-stack` (T2 tier) — 5/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Transient notification messages.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-toast/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-toast.ts`, `hx-toast.styles.ts`, `hx-toast.stories.ts`, `hx-toast.test.ts`

**`hx-toast` props:** `variant` (`default`|`success`|`warning`|`danger`|`info`), `duration` (ms, 0 = persistent), `closable` (boolean), `open` (boolean)

**`hx-toast-stack` props:** `placement` (`top-start`|`top-center`|`top-end`|`bottom-start`|`bottom-center`|`bottom-end`), `stack-limit` (number)

**Slots on `hx-toast`:** `icon`, default (message), `action` (button)

**Events:** `hx-show`, `hx-hide`, `hx-after-hide`

**CSS Parts:** `hx-toast`: `base`, `icon`, `message`, `close-button`; `hx-toast-stack`: `base`

**ARIA:** `hx-toast` uses `role="alert"` (assertive for danger/error, polite for others) or `role="status"`. `aria-live` region. Auto-dismissal must pause on hover/focus.

**Implementation:** `hx-toast-stack` uses `position: fixed` at the specified corner. Individual toasts animate in/out. Auto-dismiss with countdown. Pause timer on mouse enter or focus within.

**Static `toast()` utility:** Export a `toast({ message, variant, duration })` helper function that imperatively creates and appends a toast.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (auto-dismiss, manual close, pause on hover), axe-core zero violations, Storybook with all variants + stack demo, bundle < 5KB combined.

Register `hx-toast` and `hx-toast-stack` in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-toast — T2 Toast/Notification Message
